title: Forest Villages
description: Adds villages to the regular forest biome, simple as that!
body:
# Forest Villages
This datapack aims to slightly enhance regular forests by adding a new village

The villages aim to appear as close to the vanilla style as they can get
Inside you will be able to find a bunch of loot, crops, wheat, bees and functional building for villagers

![Village Center](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gtgvkB2H/images/4878d7c1d407ec70761495ef43e8b914b4e14a1e.png)

![Village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gtgvkB2H/images/a44cd050fd5191f2784d1a27d82239b320664f07.png)

![Nitwit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gtgvkB2H/images/e9dab8812173e44cc090dc1c5bb32be7143c8d66.png)
